\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
\doxylink{classGaussian}{Gaussian} quadrature helpers for Green\textquotesingle{}s functions and incident fields. 

The templated class \doxylink{classGaussQuad}{Gauss\+Quad$<$\+Type$>$} performs first‑order \doxylink{classGaussian}{Gaussian} quadrature on triangular surface elements for two broad families of integrands\+:

1) {\bfseries{Green\textquotesingle{}s function kernels}} used in SIE matrix assembly. 2) {\bfseries{Incident fields}} used to build right‑hand‑side vectors.

The interface is intentionally minimal and relies on the following contracts with the template parameter {\ttfamily Type\+:} 
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item For {\bfseries{Green\textquotesingle{}s integrals}}\+: {\ttfamily Type} must expose dyadic or scalar Green\textquotesingle{}s evaluation methods with signature
\item {\ttfamily dcmplx Type\+:\+:(rvec r, rvec rp)} for scalar kernels, and/or
\item {\ttfamily cvec Type\+:\+:(rvec r, rvec rp)} for vector kernels, and a {\ttfamily Wave\+Vec()} method returning $ k $.
\item For {\bfseries{incident integrals}}\+: {\ttfamily Type} must expose
\item {\ttfamily cvec Type\+:\+:(rvec r)} (single field), or
\item {\ttfamily std\+::vector\texorpdfstring{$<$}{<}cvec\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>} Type\+:\+:(rvec r)} returning {\ttfamily \{E, H\}} at {\ttfamily r}.
\end{DoxyItemize}

Integration accuracy is controlled by Dunavant rules (see {\ttfamily \doxylink{quadrature_8h}{quadrature.\+h}}). 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{GaussQuad_8h_source}{Gauss\+Quad.\+h}}.
